response.original_title: How do I get money out of my Kraken wallet?{{Withdraw  fund}
response.overview: Withdrawing funds ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  from a cryptocurrency exchange like Kraken is a common user task. The ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  first step is ensuring you have converted your crypto into cash. You ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  must sell your Bitcoin or other assets for USD or your local currency. Once ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  the trade is complete, the cash will sit in your Kraken balance. From ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  there, you can move it to your personal bank account easily. Linking Your Bank Account Kraken requires ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  a verified bank account before you can initiate any cash withdrawal. Navigate ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  to the "Payment Methods" section in your account settings to link one. You ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  can use Plaid for an instant link or enter your details manually. Manual ⭐ +1.850.600.1393  verification may take a few days as Kraken sends small test deposits.
